Transfer chicken to a plate to cool and pour water from Dutch oven into a bowl for later use.

Heat olive oil in the Dutch oven over medium heat. Cook and stir onion and bell pepper in hot oil until onion is soft and translucent, 4 to 5 minutes. Add garlic to onion mixture; cook and stir until garlic is fragrant, about 1 minute.

Mix chicken broth, black beans, Great Northern beans, diced tomatoes, green chile peppers, chili powder, oregano, cumin, and salt into onion mixture. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium, cover Dutch oven, and simmer until soup flavors blend, about 20 minutes.
Remove bone from chicken and discard. Shred chicken meat into small pieces using your hands or a fork. Add chicken and corn to soup; cover Dutch oven and cook until corn is warmed, about 5 minutes.

how-to-cook-hard-boiled-eggs.name: How To Cook Hard-boiled Eggs
instructions: Place eggs in a pot. Cover with cold water until the eggs are covered by about 1 inch (2 cm) of water.
Bring to a boil, uncovered. Once boiling, take off the heat.

Cover and cook for 4-16 minutes, depending on preference (4-6 minutes for soft-boiled, 8-10 minutes for medium-boiled, 12-16 minutes for hard-boiled). In the meantime, fill a large bowl with ice and cold water, creating an ice bath.
Once eggs reach desired cook-time, immediately remove the eggs from pot and place in the ice bath. Allow eggs to cool for 10-15 minutes.
To peel, lightly tap the eggs on a flat surface, then gently roll back and forth (taking extra care with soft-boiled eggs).
Pull away the loosened shell and peel any remaining pieces.
Serve as is or incorporate into your favorite recipe that requires hard-boiled eggs.
Enjoy!

80 gr de almendras laminadas y tostadas

instructions: Bat butter with glass sugar till it's very creamy and pale (about 5 minutes). Add egg yolks one by one, beating well after each addition. Add the vanilla extract and the lemon plate.
In another bowl, beat the cream with cold milk till soft peaks form. Fold it into butter cream with wrapped movements. That will give light to the mixture.

Remove cookies for a few seconds in tibia milk with vanilla (don't leave them for long or they will be broken). It puts a layer of cookies at the bottom of a rectangular or square mold. Then a generous cape of cream. Sprinkle some laminated almonds. Repeat the process to fill the mold with a layer of cream.

Decorate the top with more almond, fresh fruit and a few mint leaves. It cover with film paper and refrigerates at least 6 hours, but the ideal thing is to leave it all night to have better consistency and taste.

how-to-make-vegetarian-sushi-comedera.name: How To Make Vegetarian Sushi

ingredients.item: ¼ cda of vinegar of rice
1 Peeling cucumbers with no seed (cut into paddles)

instructions: Start your recipe, washing the rice several times with abundant cold water till completely clear.
Put sushi rice into a saucer and add a cup and a half of water. Meg and cook till water boils, stir every 2 minutes.
When it balls, put down the fire, cover and cook for about 15 minutes to a little call till water gets absorbed. Do not cover while cooking.
When cooked, remove from fire and leave to stand for about 15 minutes.
Add the rice into a bowl and pour the vinegar and the rice wine. Mix till completely flavour.
Expand the rice onto a plate and cover with paper or a clear cloth and leave to rest for 2 hours till the rice will dry.
Keep a bamboo matt to your hand and place the nori leaf with the bright part down.
It moistens your hands and stretches half a cup of rice till it covers most of the nori leaf, leaves a space.
It puts some cucumbers, peppers and carrots at the centre and throughout.
Once you have all the ingredients at the centre, you're going to roll up the ori with the help of the matt and go and press as you roll up to the elk's limit, moist that space and stick to the roll.
Let them rest a few minutes before cutting.
With the help of a sharp knife, cut the roll in half and then cut the roles from two cm or a little less.
Now, they're ready to taste.
We're starting!

how-to-prepare-a-juicy-rigatoni-with-cho.name: How To Prepare A Juicy Rigatoni With Chorizo
how-to-prepare-a-juicy-rigatoni-with-cho.original_name: Cómo preparar un jugoso rigatoni con chorizo

ingredients.item: 150 g of chorizo (Spanish, Argentina or Mexican)
1  tomate maduro grande rallado o 150 ml de tomate triturado
100 ml de crema de leche o nata para cocinar
30 gr de queso parmesano rallado (puedes combinarlo con pecorino o grana padano)
1 cda de aceite de oliva virgen extra
1 / 2 cdite of smoked peppermint or sweet paprika
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto
A handful of fresh parsley or basil to decorate
50 ml of white wine or a few drops of lemon to balance fat

instructions: In a large pot with water and salt, it boils rigatoni following the package's indications till they are at dente. Listen to them by saving half a cup of cooking water.
In a large frying pan, add olive oil and sock onion and garlic until they become transparent.
Incorpora el chorizo en rodajas o desmenuzado. Cocina durante 5-7 minutos hasta que suelte su grasa y se dore ligeramente.
Add the white wine and let the alcohol evaporate over medium heat.
Incorporates shredded tomato and smoked peppermint. Cooking for 5 minutes, occasionally stirring.
Gather the milk cream, mix well and cook 3 more minutes till the salsa weighs slightly. Adjust salt and pepper.
Add the cooked rigatoni to frying pan with salsa. If necessary, add some cooking water to adjust the texture.
Espolvorea el queso rallado y mezcla hasta que se funda completamente.
Presenta los rigatoni en platos hondos y decora con perejil o albahaca fresca.

how-to-prepare-juicy-chicken-skewers-in-.name: How To Prepare Juicy Chicken Skewers In An Airfryer
how-to-prepare-juicy-chicken-skewers-in-.original_name: Cómo preparar jugosos pinchos de pollo en airfryer
instructions: In a large bowl, mix olive oil, minced garlic, cumin, hot pimenton, turmeric, ginger, salt and black pepper.
Add chicken cubes and make sure they are well covered with the marinade. Let marinate in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour, ideally 2 hours, so that flavors blend.
Toss the seawed chicken cubes into the brocketas, making sure they are evenly distributed.
It purifies the airfryer to 200 been 3 been (199 been 3) for 5 minutes.
Put the duds in the airfryer basket, make sure there's space between them for a uniform cooking. Cooking for 12-15 minutes, turning his pinks midway through, till they are golden and fully cooked.

how-to-prepare-spinach-lasagna-comedera.name: How To Prepare Spinach Lasagna
how-to-prepare-spinach-lasagna-comedera.original_name: Cómo preparar lasaña de espinacas fácil

ingredients.item: 2  2 paquetes de espinacas congeladas  ((descongela, escurre bien y divide en 2))
280 g lasagna paste ((cooked, cold enough to manipulate them))

instructions: Warm up the oven at 180 ° C, slightly grease your baking plate or lasagna mold.
En un bowl mediano, combina el queso picota con la mitad de las espinacas y la mitad del queso parmesano, el huevo, el ajo en polvo y sal. Mezcla hasta que se incorporen los ingredientes.
En otro bowl, mezcla el resto de las espinacas con la salsa de tomate.
At the bottom of your mold, place 1 / 2 cup of salsa and spinach mixture, enough to cover it. Put the lasagna dough up.
Cover the first layer of pasta with 3 / 4 of the sauce and distribute it evenly.
With a small spoon, put 1 / 3 of the ricotta mixture onto the salsa cape, spacing small balls throughout and across. Spill up 1 / 4 mozzarella cheese.
Repeat with 2 more layers of pasta, salsa, ricotta and mozzarella.
Cover with one more layer of dough, the rest of the sauce, mozzarella cheese and the rest of parmesan cheese.
Fits a piece of aluminum paper, bigger than mold. Cover him with this aluminum.
Hornea por 45 minutos o hasta que el queso de arriba comience a burbujear.
Take the paper with care and let the lasagna bake for 20- 30 minutes more or till the cheese melts completely.
Saca del horno con cuidado, corta y sirve.

huckleberry-crisp.name: Huckleberry Crisp
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Lightly grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Combine huckleberries and lemon juice in a medium bowl.
Mix white sugar, cornstarch, and 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon in a separate bowl until well combined. Pour over huckleberries: toss to coat. Pour filling into the prepared pan.
Toss brown sugar, flour, oats, ground nutmeg, and 1 ½ teaspoons ground cinnamon in a small bowl until combined. Add butter: stir until clumps begin to form. Spread topping over huckleberry filling.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 30 minutes. Cool for 15 minutes before serving.

hummus-with-roasted-tomatoes.name: Hummus With Roasted Tomatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast almonds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until slightly darkened in color and fragrant, 7–10 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop. Reduce oven temperature to 250°.

Toss tomatoes, thyme, and garlic with 1 Tbsp. oil on a clean rimmed baking sheet; season with salt. Roast until tomatoes are softened and shriveled but not mushy, 1–1½ hours; pluck out thyme and garlic and discard (makes about 2¼ cups).

Spread hummus on a plate and top with about 1 cup roasted tomatoes (reserve remaining tomatoes for another use). Drizzle with remaining 3 Tbsp. oil and top with cilantro and toasted almonds. Sprinkle with nigella seeds.
Do Ahead: Tomatoes can be roasted 3 days ahead. Cover and chill. Reheat gently before serving.
